meaning: n.[植] 车前草,香蕉之一种
examples: A wax obtained from the leaves of a plantain.
It makes a lovely picture, the bamboo houses set off by green plantain trees.
Plantain contains a chemical (called allantoin) that is anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial.
It's not often you order plantain hash with fried ceviche and come out smiling.
Switch back to his traditional crop, plantain, and he may earn one-twentieth of that figure.
